text.title: Backend Languages Practices Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the practices-backend-languages methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pick-language
step.action: Identify target language from input. Reject if outside go/rails/laravel/spring/dotnet/rust.
step.decision-gate: If language not supported, STOP and route to language-specific methodology.

step.name: scaffold-layout
step.action: Emit the canonical directory layout for the language (cmd/internal/pkg for Go; app/services for Rails; etc.).

step.name: emit-canonical-files
step.action: Write entry point + one service class showing the idiomatic pattern (constructor injection / Result returns / thin controller).

step.name: review-against-rules
step.action: Walk the six rules. Mark each as pass/fail; fix failures before commit.

step.name: validate
step.action: Run scripts/validate-practices-backend-languages.py. All required booleans must be true.
step.decision-gate: If validator fails, fix code and re-review.
